lore: Tap the main blob exactly 999 times without spending any Goo

lore: 0.1% chance to appear on any successful breed

name: Oversized Slime

name: Miniature Slime

notes: Triggered when any slime reaches level 10 for the first time

name: Elder Slime
lore: A single slime remains at max level for 24 real-world hours

name: Haunted Slime

notes: Tap the same slime 50 consecutive times without tapping anything else
